steps.title: Use the style description
steps.content: The student wants to describe the distinctive style of Redhorse's sculptures. The notes define that style by saying he depicted Native American figures using abstract, modernist forms.

steps.title: Separate style from context
steps.content: Choice A says a distinctive style existed but does not describe it. Choice C focuses on Redhorse's influence on other artists. Choice D names one well-known sculpture but not the style's features. The choice about abstract, modernist forms describes the style directly. The answer is B.
